text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day after the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio once again asks to continue training
without a rest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you know? They say the Kikuka Sho
tests who's really the strongest runner!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna surpass Prez, I gotta be considered
that strong too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna do some more partner running
today!
choice_data_list: You sure you're not fatigued at all?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! Who do you take me for? I'm the
invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, the Kikuka Sho waits for no one! This is no
time to rest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, she resumes training like usual.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just a liiittle faster! Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Phew... Nice work, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you too! Thanks for running with me!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say, your running is incredible... Aren't you
practically the number one classic-year racer
already?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well my goal is to beat Prez, so I've gotta
get even faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Teio keeps training with runner after runner.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... You run so well, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I don't know what it is, but I can just feel how badly you want to win.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, gotta do what I gotta do if I'm gonna
achieve my goa―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ow!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ouch! Oof, that hurts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of nowhere, Tokai Teio collapses with a
grimace of great pain on her face!

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the kind of damage that results from just
a few days of training.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
It's a much longer-term strain that's finally
reached breaking point.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Teio, you must have known your legs were in bad
condition, but you kept running despite that,
didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...I've been feeling it ever since the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I thought that if I stopped training, there was
no way I could win the Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: So you just pushed on through the pain...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry to say, but the Kikuka Sho might be
too much for someone in your condition.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! N-no way!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
choice_data_list: We'll need to put training on hold for now.
We'll need to put training on hold for now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: N-no! I can't afford to rest!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, my legs do hurt, but... it's not that big of a deal!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let me train! I have to run in the Kikuka Sho!
choice_data_list: Didn't you hear what the doctor just said?
Didn't you hear what the doctor just said?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... I don't care! I said I'm gonna enter!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I need to win! It's the only way I can show I'm
ready to take on Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you won't support me, then I'll do it myself! You
don't need to train me anymore!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... G-get as mad as you like! See if I care! I'm
not gonna change my mind!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez told me she was glad that I'd joined her on
the same stage!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She's waiting for me to reach her! I can't just stop
now and leave her hanging!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With tears welling up in her eyes, Tokai Teio
gives me a look that tells me she's not giving up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've always looked up to her! Before I entered the
academy up till now! And I always will!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No matter how strong Prez is, I won't give up!
Ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in the face of hardship, her dream never
wavers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But what about me? Should I really just give up?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, Trainer? Why are you reading a book all of
a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Acupuncture. Massages. Whatever the method...
choice_data_list: I'll find a way to get you back into racing form!
I'll find a way to get you back into racing form!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You mean... you'll still let me run? I can still train
for the Kikuka Sho?!
choice_data_list: Trainers are supposed to support their racers.
Trainers are supposed to support their racers.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah... you're right! Heheh... Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And... I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't have kept the pain a secret. And I said
some awful things just now too... Even though I
know I can't do this alone...
choice_data_list: We're going to get through this together!
We're going to get through this together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, I'm gonna try to find ways to recover too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look, this book says hot springs have healing
properties! Let's go on a hot spring trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the days that follow, we do everything we can
to help her legs heal, and Teio pushes through
the worst of it, avoiding any chronic injuries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a team, we ready ourselves for the third
Classic race—the Kikuka Sho!
